title: geum × fridae
intro: Geum × fridae, also known as Fringed Avens, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The roots and flowers of the Geum × fridae plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Geum × fridae include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Geum × fridae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
